name: Tax-Free Transfer of Contiguous Branch Assets

eligibility.description: Applies to domestic stock life insurance companies with branches in Canada or Mexico that meet the operational requirements of Section 814(b).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Domestic stock life insurance companies can elect to transfer contiguous country branch assets to a foreign corporation without the application of Section 367 gain recognition (subject to certain limitations).
